messages.content:
Hi Pawan
We are running a fitness initiative called Reshape Nation with the mission to spread awareness of health & fitness and also help people get healthier & fitter across the Globe. Please DO visit the FB page, like, and help us make India & the world healthier.
https://www.facebook.com/ReshapeNation/
